links.source_location: addTag mutation invalidatesTags: ['Tag'] which is owned by tags_api providesTags
documentId is the primary key threaded through all annotation endpoints; Document cache tag invalidation cascades when document is deleted/restored
Annotation assignment (assigneeId field in UpdateAnnotationSchema) triggers backend notifications; notifications_api surfaces these to assignees
enqueueToast dispatched on annotation create/update/delete errors after optimistic update undo — cross-slice error feedback pattern
undoStack/redoStack manage UndoEntry referencing AnnotationWithTags; annotation mutations call pushUndo after RTK Query resolves
Schema mirrors TypeScript types: AnnotationTypeSchema enumerates same values as AnnotationType union; PositionDataSchema validates same discriminated union as PositionData type
lines 4-9 imports ToolId, AnnotationDraft, UndoEntry, SaveStatus, MAX_UNDO_STACK, DEFAULT_ANNOTATION_COLOR
lines 64-66, 183-184: getState().auth.user used for optimistic comment author and reaction toggle
getDocumentViewerData providesTags includes Bookmark LIST tag — invalidating bookmarks_api also refetches viewer bootstrap
Both query /documents/:id/members; collaboration_api provides Document tag, members_api provides DocumentMember tag for same endpoint
Share links and member invites are both document access-grant mechanisms; both keyed by documentId and compose into the share dialog
Notifications driven by comment mentions (CreateCommentArg.mentions field) and annotation assignments — notifications are downstream side-effects of comment/annotation mutations
Share/invite modal opened via modals payload triggers member invite flow using members_api
Generic modal system (openModal id+payload) gates share dialog which renders share_links_api + members_api data
Zustand store owns ephemeral UI state (zoom, tool, draft, undo) while viewer_api owns persisted server state (document, bookmarks, readingProgress) — architectural split by volatility
ViewerProvider instantiates and exposes ViewerStore via React Context; useViewer hook reads from store
Option A: Run worker on VPS with PM2
